programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Jack Johnson - Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Jack Johnson featuring unforgettable version of his hits: 'Better Together', 'Good People', 'Taylor' and many more.

programme.title: John Lee Hooker - Live At Montreux 1990
programme.desc: The legendary bluesman John Lee Hooker brought his boogie style blend of rhythm & blues to deliver two blistering performances at the Montreux Jazz Festival in 1983 and 1990.

programme.title: The Everly Brothers Reunion Concert
programme.desc: The 1983 London reunion features "Bye, Bye Love," "Wake Up Little Suzie," "Bird Dog" and "Cathy's Clown."

programme.title: Heart - Live At The Royal Albert Hall
programme.desc: This film captures not only Heart's first-ever live performance at the Royal Albert Hall but is also the first concert film of Heart performing with a full orchestra.

programme.title: Qello Concerts
programme.desc: Earlier this year Lynyrd Skynyrd performed their first two studio albums, Pronounced 'Lĕh-'nérd 'Skin-'nérd and Second Helping, live in their entirety for the first time, at two specially staged concerts at the Florida Theatre in their home town of J...

programme.title: The Beach Boys - Good Vibrations Tour
programme.desc: The Beach Boys Special is a rockumentary which explores the life of the Beach Boys as camera and crews follow them across the United States on their Good Vibrations Tour.

programme.title: Alabama & Friends - Live at the Ryman
programme.desc: Join superstar band Alabama, recorded at the historic Ryman Auditorium, featuring on stage collaborations with country's biggest stars: Luke Bryan, Jason Aldean, Trisha Yearwood, Florida Georgia Line, Jamey Johnson and the Eli Young Band.

programme.title: ZZ Top - Live at Montreux
programme.desc: ZZ Top has made a number of visits to Montreux and this concert from 2013 is undoubtedly one of their finest live performances. The set list blends tracks from early seventies through their eighties blockbuster period and up to their most recent rele...

programme.title: Journey - Live in Manila
programme.desc: On March 14, 2009, Journey returned to Arnel Pineda's homeland and introduced him as their newest lead singer to a crowd of nearly 30,000 at the SM Mall of Asia Concert Grounds. Features songs such as Don't Stop Believin', Stone In Love, When You Lov...

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali is interviewed.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Mrs. Georgia Jackson, mother of slain Soledad Brother George Jackson, is interviewed by producer- Ellis Haizlip. Other show features include the exciting Latin-jazz sounds of seven man combo.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: This program traces the roots of Black protest in America by means of passages from Frederick Douglass' greatest orations, dramatized by Arthur Bufghardt, interspersed with performances by drummer Max Roach.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Author James Baldwin is interviewed by the young Black poetess Nikki Giovanni in a special two-part presentation of Soul!, taped in London.

programme.title: Hamilton: One Shot To Broadway
programme.desc: The story of the hit musical that changed Broadway forever and brought the genius of Lin Manuel Miranda to the attention of legions of fans across the world. Featuring interviews with Miranda, as well as the cast and crew of Hamilton.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real viewer favorite! With silky shades pink, mauve and lilac, Bob Ross completes an amazing birch tree landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The splendor of fall is produced by Bob Ross's red, orange and brown grasses and foliage, softly complimenting a rugged little shed.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' striking color contrasts create a scene that appears to thaw under the bright sun of a late winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates soft purple sky and tall trees that almost seem to float in the hazy foothills of a distant, blue-grey mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Roll up your trousers and walk the beach with Bob Ross; enjoy a sky full of clouds and waves crashing carelessly upon the rocks.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a beautiful summer scene today - rushing little riverlet flowing through the luscious greenery of a cabin landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A weathered fence guards a rustic country home shadowed by tall trees as Bob Ross creates another masterpiece in his unique style.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross in the mountains of the east, and bask in the breathtaking serenity of a waterfall bubbling and splashing, nestled among the evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Majestic snow-covered peaks and evergreens loom over lush green grasslands as Bob Ross takes you into his world of natural beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to the middle of winter, where shades of indigo create the stark reality of the season. You'd better bundle up for this one!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures a real 'dreamscape' on canvas -- soft rolling hills, birch trees and pretty lake; paint along and add your own touches.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an expansive barn appearing half-covered in a snowy setting of frost-bitten foliage and sun-kissed sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A different kind of oval today! - Bob Ross paints a pretty, panoramic cold mountain lake scene inside this fun frame.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you for a walk on the shore; soothing waves rolling in from the sea to the palm trees - all in a delightful seashell shape on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a picturesque spot in the meadow and delight in the discovery of not one, but two serene fishing holes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a proud strong windmill, standing in watch beside old farm buildings where happy little animals lay still in the night.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a place just like this on a warm summer day - Bob Ross creates clear sky and shade trees by a nice swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Prepare the canvas just-so, and in the end, you'll have a Bob Ross landscape -- mighty mountain, homey cabin, and meadow -- in a window!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: From a quiet spot by this smooth-stoned river, join Bob Ross for a very, very distant view of a lovely snow-covered mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a golden selection of colors in this gorgeous fall mountain scene, all within a cleverly different oval shape on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a hike with Bob Ross to the southwestern region, see the beauty of fresh skies over sun-glistened mountains and silvery mere.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses beautiful shades of green that burst forth in this exciting and realistic display of nature's wonder.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins makes sure the chill of autumn is felt creeping in on the banks of a winding creek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Ice cold pond, snowy-covered banks, soft hues in the sky … Bob Ross teaches us to admire the simple beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A visit with Bob Ross takes you to a secluded cabin, snuggled deep into the blankety drifts of fluffy snow, far into the frozen mountains.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex gets Walker and Trivette assigned to a movie being filmed as technical advisers. While on the set, Walker overhears several stuntmen talking about a train robbery they are planning.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The homeless are being beaten by a group of teens who film their attack. Walker poses as a homeless man to see if he can catch them in the act.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A group of men kidnap a wealthy businessman and take others who were standing near. Alex is one of the people kidnapped. While the kidnappers are arranging for ransom, Alex manages to call Walker with information to help him find them.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
